signals.reasoning: BTC is already deep into a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL is already in flush territory and the board itself flags it no-trade, so I would wait rather than force it.
0G is still the strongest squeeze-long candidate because funding is extremely negative while price remains strong, but the move is already extended and caution keeps size small.
IP is a secondary reduced-size squeeze long because funding is clearly negative and the price damage is still limited, but liquidity keeps conviction capped.
RESOLV is the cleaner secondary long because funding is negative while price is still holding up better than the broader tape, though liquidity is still poor.
GOAT is already deeply flushed and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
LIT is already down hard and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
2Z has squeeze fuel from negative funding, but liquidity is too poor and the setup is too unstable to force a fresh long.
SPX is already deeply flushed and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
STBL is already in a deep flush state and no longer offers a clean fresh short entry despite still-crowded funding.
